records.title: agent approval reject execute trace audit
records.notes: Agent session agent-session-84af77a0-eaa2-413e-ac89-5c35b842ab2e required approval, preserved state on rejection, executed after approval, and produced trace/audit evidence.

records.title: agent direct run rejected before approval
records.notes: Agent session agent-session-5cd2c966-21f2-4c86-9fd4-43c8582b1ecf rejected direct run for pending tool call agent-tool-c23fcc4f-87bb-4558-97eb-478a7423b876 with APPROVAL_REQUIRED and preserved pending approval state without draft side effects.

records.title: API mode browser auth runtime parity
records.notes: /api/v1/me accepted smoke auth and the API-mode page loaded without auth errors.

records.title: debugging write permission denial ui and api
records.notes: Read-only node flow hid write controls; forced API write as acceptance-debug-nonwriter returned 403 debugging:write without a debug-node-write audit event.

records.title: debugging simulator read write mismatch rollback audit
records.notes: Simulator write and mismatch paths produced audit evidence; snapshot 10a9c3af-8dd5-4a20-b7a1-e6896286d582 rolled back to the original safe value.

records.title: log upload complete evidence feedback archive unsupported
records.notes: Log c6874909-2b02-4e5a-90c9-2227278aac55 completed analysis, linked evidence, recorded feedback, archived successfully, and rejected unsupported upload with a readable failure.

records.title: completed log reanalysis creates rerun job progress and audit
records.notes: Log 62f26d1b-06e2-4e3e-8739-4d0d0c1772f2 created rerun 06dfe22b-20b2-4094-90f0-5c702159879b; UI refreshed the log workbench and audit recorded log-rerun with job metadata.

records.title: parameter admin import preview and audit drawer
records.notes: Admin audit drawer opened and parameter import preview rendered without committing preview-only data.

records.title: workflow assignee defaults are eligible
records.notes: All workflow assignee selectors defaulted to non-empty eligible active users.

records.title: workflow assignee dropdowns hide ineligible users
records.notes: Inactive, guest, admin-only, and role-ineligible users were absent from workflow assignee dropdowns.

records.title: forced invalid workflow assignees rejected
records.notes: The parameter submission API rejected role-ineligible workflow assignees with VALIDATION_FAILED.

records.title: parameter draft edit and remove before submission
records.notes: Edited one draft target value, removed another draft item, and verified only the edited item reached final submission preview.

records.title: parameter management submit review merge persistence audit

records.notes: Parameter request 09359156-3bb1-40f7-bba5-0a8ac0a71ee3 merged, persisted target value, and produced parameter-merge audit evidence.

records.title: blank parameter draft reason blocked
records.notes: Blank draft reason left the submit action disabled before an API submission could be made.

records.title: parameter review rejection reason persistence audit
records.notes: Parameter request f99d36f5-b28f-45ef-a995-4d72f7024d87 was rejected through the browser UI and produced persisted rejection and parameter-review-reject audit evidence.

records.title: user governance admin only and self protection
records.notes: Admin saw user governance, active Admin self-disable controls were disabled, and Hardware User received controlled permission denial.
